text.title: ai-enhanced-design-systems Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for ai-enhanced-design-systems as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: AI confuses semantic tokens (--color-action-primary) with primitive tokens (--color-blue-500) in suggestions.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Without explicit semantic/primitive distinction in the prompt, agents use the terms interchangeably. Semantic tokens must reference primitive tokens — not the reverse. Require explicit token layer distinction in every token-related prompt.

failure-mode.description: AI-generated Storybook stories use deprecated CSF 2 syntax instead of CSF 3.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Without specifying the Storybook version in the prompt, agents default to CSF 2 patterns that generate deprecation warnings or fail in Storybook 8+. Always specify the exact Storybook and CSF version.

failure-mode.description: AI-generated documentation not reviewed by the engineer who built the component.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: AI documentation reads accurately but frequently contains subtle errors about edge cases, deprecated props, or platform-specific behavior. Only the component author can verify these details.

failure-mode.description: Running token inconsistency detection on a codebase with more than 500 files in a single prompt.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Large codebases exceed single-prompt context. Chunk by directory; aggregate and de-duplicate results after all chunks are processed.

failure-mode.description: Creating new token names in AI-generated documentation without human approval.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: AI invents token names that may duplicate existing tokens or violate naming conventions. Require the agent to reference existing token names only; flag any proposed new token for human review.

failure-mode.description: Using AI to build foundational design system structure from scratch.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: AI amplifies existing structure; it does not create coherent foundations. A system built from AI output will have inconsistent token relationships, arbitrary naming, and no coherent design rationale. Human-led foundation design must come first.
